title: Butter Chicken (Murgh Makhani) (Community Enhanced)
instructions: Marinate chicken in yogurt and spices.
Make sauce with butter, tomato, ginger-garlic.
Add extra garam masala and a dash of cream at the end.
Add chicken to sauce and serve.

source_review.text: Restaurant quality! I used coconut milk instead of heavy cream for a lighter version. Added a pinch of kasuri methi (dried fenugreek) at the end.

modifications_applied.reasoning: To create a lighter version of the dish

source_review.text: Delicious! Added extra garam masala and a dash of cream at the end. Served over basmati rice with naan.

modifications_applied.reasoning: Enhances flavor and richness of the dish

changes_made.to_text: Add extra garam masala and a dash of cream at the end.

enhancement_summary.expected_impact: To create a lighter version of the dish; Enhances flavor and richness of the dish
